title: Quality / Eval / Minimal Metrics Governance
intent: Add lightweight quality model, eval matrix, and minimal workflow metrics without introducing a dashboard or a manually maintained metrics truth source.
scope_delta: add QUALITY-MODEL policy template and checker
add EVAL-MATRIX policy template and checker
add doctor quality and doctor workflow reports
aggregate minimal workflow metrics from existing results and ledgers
non_goals: no manually maintained WORKFLOW-METRICS truth source
quant_lab_relevance: Defines the quality and eval baseline used by quant-lab redesign precheck and later redesign CRs.
